From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

2019 Singaporean TV series or program

| *From Beijing to Moscow* | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| 北京到莫斯科 | |
| Genre | Romance-mystery |
| Created by | Wai Thong 周伟堂 |
| Written by | Wai Thong 周伟堂   Link Sng 孙逸群 |
| Directed by | Sam Loh 罗胜 |
| Starring | [River Huang](/wiki/River_Huang "River Huang")   Jojo Goh [Felicia Chin](/wiki/Felicia_Chin "Felicia Chin")   [Aloysius Pang](/wiki/Aloysius_Pang "Aloysius Pang") |
| Country of origin | Singapore |
| Original language | Mandarin |
| No. of episodes | 13 |
| Production | |
| Producer | Wai Thong 伟堂 |
| Production locations | [China](/wiki/China "China") [Mongolia](/wiki/Mongolia "Mongolia") [Russia](/wiki/Russia "Russia") |
| Original release | |
| Network | [Toggle](/wiki/Toggle_(website) "Toggle (website)") |
| Release | 13 June (2019-06-13) – 25 July 2019 (2019-07-25) |

***From Beijing to Moscow*** ([Chinese](/wiki/Simplified_Chinese_characters "Simplified Chinese characters"): 北京到莫斯科) is an original [Toggle](/wiki/Toggle_(website) "Toggle (website)") 13-episode romance-mystery series starring [River Huang](/wiki/River_Huang "River Huang"), Jojo Goh, [Felicia Chin](/wiki/Felicia_Chin "Felicia Chin") and [Aloysius Pang](/wiki/Aloysius_Pang "Aloysius Pang"). It premiered on 13 June 2019 on [Toggle](/wiki/Toggle_(website) "Toggle (website)").[[1]](#cite_note-toggle-1) This was Aloysius Pang's last drama before his death on 23 January that year.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=From_Beijing_to_Moscow&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

Kaixiang ([River Huang](/wiki/River_Huang "River Huang")) lost his memory after an accident.[[1]](#cite_note-toggle-1)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=From_Beijing_to_Moscow&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [River Huang](/wiki/River_Huang "River Huang") as Kaixiang
* Jojo Goh as Xiaoqi
* [Felicia Chin](/wiki/Felicia_Chin "Felicia Chin") as Kloudiia
* [Aloysius Pang](/wiki/Aloysius_Pang "Aloysius Pang") as Kenneth

## Awards and nominations

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=From_Beijing_to_Moscow&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Awards and nominations")]

## Production

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=From_Beijing_to_Moscow&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Production")]

*From Beijing to Moscow* was shot in a two-month road trip to China, Mongolia and Russia from August to October 2018.[[3]](#cite_note-3)
